description:
An intuitive video editor for every skill level.

Filmora is an intuitive video editor for every skill level. Filmora makes it easy for anyone to be creative. Jump into an editing experience where advanced features are simple and fun. We got rid of repetitive tasks so you can devote your energy to your imagination. Get inspired by Filmora, an editor designed for creators like you.
1. Customize Multi-Screen Effects with More ControlNew adjustable parameters let you fine-tune multi-screen effects and create richer, more dynamic split-screen visuals.
2. Add Visual Effects with Built-In SoundNew audio-visual effects come with matching sound, so you can create synchronized visuals and audio without searching for extra sound effects.
3. Make Your Pet the Star with New Pet EffectsNew pet outline and cutout background effects help highlight your furry friend and make pet videos more playful and expressive.
